nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript/JavaScript-specific coding style extending common/coding-style.md: explicit types on public APIs, interface vs type alias guidance, avoiding any, React props typing, JSDoc for JS files, immutability with spread, zod validation, and console.log prohibition.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript-specific hook configuration: PostToolUse hooks for Prettier auto-format and tsc type-check after edits, plus Stop hooks for console.log audit.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript-specific patterns: generic ApiResponse<T> envelope, useDebounce custom hook with cleanup, and Repository interface with standard CRUD operations.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript-specific security guidance on environment variable secret management and leveraging the security-reviewer skill for comprehensive audits.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: TypeScript-specific testing rules: Playwright as the designated E2E framework and e2e-runner agent support for critical user flows.
